displayTitle: Legacy #15: Claws of the Dragon pt. 2
synopsis: In a Mofference, the Moffs discuss the power they could wield if they captured Cade Skywalker. Meanwhile, Cade is being tortured by the Sith. His resistance to Darth Maladi's poison impresses Darth Krayt, who urges him to turn to the dark side, only to be met with a flat refusal. Krayt then brings out Jariah Syn and Deliah Blue, revealing that both have been infected with a Yuuzhan Vong seed and that only Cade's healing powers can save them, forcing him to draw on the dark power to heal them. Cade agrees to let Krayt try to convince him to turn if the Sith Lord frees Jariah and Deliah; Krayt consents and lets them go. Days later, Krayt calls a private meeting with Cade and Darth Talon. He shows them Kol Skywalker's lightsaber encased in transparisteel, arguing that the dark side does not preclude acts of pride or respect, before revealing to the pair his true identity as A'Sharad Hett.
title: Legacy #15: Claws of the Dragon pt. 2
